goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'theatre' and should be in the 'east'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'peterborough' and should 'arrive by 19:00'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of theatre and should be in the east
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to peterborough and should arrive by 19:00
The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
